creator: naylor.b.david@gmail.com
text:
Oops, sorry.  Didn't read pkg-message properly and failed to `kldload 
vboxnetflt`.  

When kldloaded bridging doesn't work with bridge0 and tap0 (but it does with 
my 'external' card dc0).  This means I cannot ping the host computer (or 
establish any other connection).  bridge0 is the interface that has the host's 
IP address.
